2606.18021.title: LegalHalluLens: Typed Hallucination Auditing and Calibrated Multi-Agent Debate for Trustworthy Legal AI
2606.18021.paper_summary: AI systems deployed in legal workflows hallucinate at rates that aggregate metrics report at ~52%, but this average conceals where errors concentrate and in which direction they run, leaving compliance officers without an actionable signal for trustworthy deployment. We present LegalHalluLens, an auditing framework with three components: typed hallucination profiles across four legally-motivated claim categories (numeric, temporal, obligation/entitlement, factual) over CUAD (Hendrycks et al., 2021); a Risk Direction Index (RDI) that reduces omission-versus-invention bias to a single deployment-comparable scalar; and a typed debate pipeline calibrated to both magnitudes and directions. Across 510 contracts and 249,252 clause-level instances we measure a within-model gap of approximately 38-40 pp between obligation/numeric and temporal claims that aggregate reporting hides, and show that two systems with matched 52% rates can carry opposite RDIs. The debate pipeline reduces fabricated detections by 45% with per-category gains tracking the diagnosis, matching commercial APIs with a substantially smaller backbone (4B active parameters). Typed profiles and RDI surface failure modes that aggregate metrics hide; we further show these diagnostics serve as calibration inputs for multi-agent debate pipelines, where Skeptic challenges and asymmetric gates targeted at measured failure modes outperform generically-tuned debate. The framework supports direction-aware procurement, accountability, and agent design for legal AI deployed in the wild.
2606.18021.paper_summary_zh: AI 系統在法律工作流程中的部署，幻覺率的綜合指標報告約為 52%，但這個平均數掩蓋了錯誤的集中位置及其走向，使合規官無法獲得可行的信號來進行可信的部署。我們提出了 LegalHalluLens，一個包含三個組件的審計框架：針對 CUAD（Hendrycks et al., 2021）中四個法律動機的索賠類別（數值、時間、義務/權利、事實）的類型化幻覺檔案；一個風險方向指數（RDI），將遺漏與發明的偏見縮減為一個可與部署相比的標量；以及一個經過調整的類型化辯論管道，能夠校準幅度和方向。在 510 份合約和 249,252 個條款級實例中，我們測量到義務/數值與時間索賠之間的模型內差距約為 38-40 個百分點，這一差距被綜合報告隱藏，並顯示出兩個匹配 52% 率的系統可以承載相反的 RDI。辯論管道將虛構檢測減少了 45%，每類別的增益與診斷相符，並且與一個顯著較小的主幹（40 億活躍參數）匹配商業 API。類型化檔案和 RDI 揭示了綜合指標隱藏的失敗模式；我們進一步顯示這些診斷作為多代理辯論管道的校準輸入，其中懷疑者挑戰和針對測量失敗模式的非對稱閘門表現優於一般調整的辯論。該框架支持方向感知的採購、問責和法律 AI 在實際應用中的代理設計。
2606.18021.author: Lalit Yadav et.al.
